name: Secretary
description: Party's chief administrator. Boosts loyalty and morale coordination.

name: Press Secretary
description: Manages party communications and media. Improves media image.

name: Fund Manager
description: Oversees party finances. Significantly boosts coin income.

name: District Head
description: Leads party operations in a district. Provides grassroots morale.

name: Campaign Manager
description: Strategizes election campaigns. Boosts support and morale.

name: Leader in House
description: Represents party in legislative house. Improves public support.

name: Chief Whip
description: Enforces party discipline. Stabilises loyalty across factions.

name: Youth Wing President
description: Leads the youth wing. Energises younger members, boosts morale.

name: Trade Union Liaison
description: Bridges party and unions. Improves coin yields from labour sectors.

name: Policy Director
description: Shapes party policy agenda. Increases media image significantly.

name: State Coordinator
description: Manages party operations across the state. Improves coins and morale.

name: Digital Media Head
description: Runs party's digital/social media. Provides strong media boost.

name: Election Strategist
description: Plans electoral strategy. Major morale and media improvements.

name: Spokesperson
description: Official voice of the party. Boosts media image.

name: Treasurer
description: Controls party treasury. Large coin income boost.
